description: Clusterization of multiple sources before processing.

actions.description: Script scans all files, extracts H1/tags/keywords, groups by shared entities

actions.format: JSON {clusters: [{id, name, sources: [], shared_keywords}], total_sources: N}

actions.description: Agent shows clusterized results for user to decide on batch processing

evaluation.note: no_batch_needed — proceed to step_6_discussion with individual sources
